description: Letter from a woman to a communal official. In Hebrew. The purpose of the letter is to advocate for herself in her marital dispute that has already come before the addressee in court. "They brought [...] to my master and said, 'Here are some of my possessions that she has destroyed,' but my master knows that when we came before you in court, he did not mention that I destroyed this shawl, and all of this is 'Perversity is in his heart, he devises evil continually, he sows discord' (Proverbs 6:14)." She flatters the addressee (חכם כמלאך האלהים) and reminds him that her (ex?)-husband is just trying to return to his divorcee, and that he hates her daughter.
description_he: מכתב מאישה לפקיד קהילה, בעברית. האישה מדברת לזכותה במחלוקת הזוגית שהגיעה לבית הדין. מציינת שבעלה (לשעבר?) מנסה לחזור לגרושתו ושהוא שונא את בתה
